query: SELECT DISTINCT ac.competenciaId, c.nome, ac.peso, DATE_FORMAT(ac.microInicio, '%Y-%m-%d') as inicio, DATE_FORMAT(ac.microTermino, '%Y-%m-%d') as termino, t.name as trilha FROM assessment_competencias ac JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id JOIN competencias c ON ac.competenciaId = c.id JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id WHERE a.name LIKE '%abio%' ORDER BY t.name, ac.peso, c.nome
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT DISTINCT ac.competenciaId, c.nome, ac.peso, DATE_FORMAT(ac.microInicio, '%Y-%m-%d') as inicio, DATE_FORMAT(ac.microTermino, '%Y-%m-%d') as termino, t.name as trilha FROM assessment_competencias ac JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id JOIN alunos a ON ap.alunoId = a.id JOIN competencias c ON ac.competenciaId = c.id JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id WHERE a.name LIKE '%abio%' ORDER BY t.name, ac.peso, c.nome
